resolutions.finding: Local synthetic and protected production evidence are represented as different provenance values and cannot satisfy the same phase gate.
Alpha closes every production feature flag; Beta is Raw-only; M3 is fixed to Budget 1; GA has no guessed mutation budget.

The ledger distinguishes one pre-Secret context rejection from eleven protected first attempts. The latest exact-main attempt passed Alpha, Raw-only Beta and identity cleanup with 100% remote Raw recovery, zero Gmail mutation and no workflow rerun.

After the real T0702 PASS and four zero-effect failed T0703 attempts, the Owner's standing instruction authorizes fully automatic Stage 7 continuation without calendar waits or manual approval and confirms the GitHub App installation and private-repository link. The current recovery Run Contract consumes only one new exact candidate delivery, one new-candidate attempt-1 dispatch and source-mutation Budget 1.

Four different exact-main T0703 attempt-1 runs passed their authority gates and identity cleanup but failed the M3 job. The fourth reached AGGREGATE_GATE after the App-token repair. Read-only post-run verification observed zero new private commits and zero Gmail Trash messages; all failed heads are immutable and cannot be rerun or redispatched.
The owner-authorized v1.0.2 successor routes every task evidence record through its exact stage schema while preserving BLOCKED, PARTIAL and NOT_RUN claims.

Local deterministic tests preserve the App-token repair and typed per-message metadata quarantine, force empty protected processing registries to SAFE_DEFERRED even when attachment extraction is safely quarantined, retain BLOCKED quarantine for active parser profiles, and expose only a closed aggregate failure class. No protected PASS is claimed.

Owner direction removes fixed seven-day and fourteen-day waits from Stage 7. M3 and Blue-Green can each complete in one bounded protected run when their deterministic recovery, mutation, comparison, reconciliation and single-Timeline evidence is complete; predecessor and safety gates remain fail closed.

T0703 retains the content-safe per-message MessageMetadataUnverifiable quarantine, exact App repository-scope probe and server-Date TTL. The fourth failure disclosed only AGGREGATE_GATE; the repair closes the proven empty-registry ordering gap and adds a closed aggregate class without claiming the unlogged live result. Broader authentication, authorization, transport, active-profile quarantine and recovery failures remain hard; exactly one new recovery-candidate dispatch is pending.

final_acceptance_policy: No local test, workflow definition or elapsed wall-clock claim can convert a protected production Oracle to PASS.
